15 March 2026 Military News

Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Fears Of Iranian Refugee Influx Grow In Central Asia As War Intensifies RFE/RL 15 Mar 2026 -- Two weeks of US-Israeli air strikes have displaced millions inside Iran, raising fears in neighboring countries about a possible refugee spillover that could potentially turn into a humanitarian crisis.

  • Trump Threatens More Kharg Attacks As Gulf Arab States' Energy Infrastructure Hit RFE/RL 15 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said that although, much of Iran's strategic Kharg Island was destroyed in a US air strike, he may order further attacks, while US-allied Arab states in the region reported disruptions to their own petroleum industries amid Iranian retaliatory attacks.
  • Trump Warns Of More Strikes On Iran As War Enters Third Week RFE/RL 15 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said that although much of Iran's strategic Kharg Island was destroyed in a US air strike, he may order further attacks as the US-Israeli war with Iran entered its third week amid fresh violence across the Middle East.
  • Trump Urges Countries Importing Oil Through Strait of Hormuz to Secure Strait Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald called on countries receiving oil through the Strait of Hormuz to ensure security of the strait, promising US assistance and coordination.
  • US wants other countries, including China, to help keep Hormuz open; experts warn root cause of blockade lies in US-Israeli military operation Global Times 15 Mar 2026 -- The Strait of Hormuz, that slender 21-mile choke point where the Persian Gulf meets the open sea, has become the world's most expensive bottleneck as the war triggered by the US-Israeli attack against Iran progressed into the third week. Marking a new development to situation, US President Donald Trump in a social media post urged countries including China, the UK, France and Japan to deploy war ships to keep the strait "open and safe." This move drew sarcasm from Iran, with Iranian Foreign Minister commenting that "US is now begging others, even China, to help it make Hormuz safe."

  • Most missiles used in war are a decade old; US does not dare enter Persian Gulf: IRGC spokesman Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) has revealed that the majority of missiles so far launched against American and Israeli targets during Operation True Promise 4 have been manufactured approximately ten years ago, with more advanced weaponry held in reserve as the imposed war enters its third week.
  • Iran launches Sejjil missile in retaliatory strikes for first time since war began Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iranian armed forces launched the 54th wave of their "True Promise 4" operations against Israeli and American targets, firing an array of advanced missiles, including the Sejjil missile for the first time since the imposed war began late in February.
  • Iranian Army targets Israel's 'security' centers, police headquarters with explosive drones Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Republic of Iran Army has launched a fresh round of drone strikes as part of Operation True Promise 4, targeting Israel's so-called security centers and police headquarters in the occupied territories.
  • IRGC dismisses claims of drone strikes on Saudi capital, Eastern Province, calls for probe Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has roundly dismissed any connection to a series of drone strikes targeting positions in the Saudi capital Riyadh and the energy-rich Eastern Province, amid the large-scale and unprovoked US-Israeli war of aggression against Iran.
  • IRGC launches hypersonic missiles, drones against US, Israeli targets Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The IRGC launches a new wave of retaliatory airstrikes against American and Israeli targets across the region.
  • IRGC vows to pursue, kill 'child-killer' Netanyahu if he is still alive Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has pledged to continue efforts aimed at chasing and killing Benjamin Netanyahu as speculations rise about the fate of the criminal Israeli prime minister.
  • US-made copy of Shahed drone used to stage false-flag attacks on region: Iran Armed Forces Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has accused the United States and Israel of deploying a rebranded copy of Iran's Shahed-136 drone, designated "Lucas," to carry out attacks on civilian infrastructure in regional countries as part of a deliberate false-flag operation aimed at framing the Islamic Republic.

  • Sudani rejects attacks on Hashd al-Shaabi as violation of Iraq's sovereignty Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iraq's Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al-Sudani has condemned recent attacks targeting Hashd al-Shaabi resistance group and security forces, describing them as a violation of the country's national sovereignty.

  • Israel running critically low on interceptors: US officials Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The Israeli regime informed the US this week that it is running critically low on ballistic missile interceptors as their air defenses get squeezed by barrages of retaliatory strikes from Iran.
  • Israel Tells US It Faces Severe Shortage of Interceptor Missiles - Reports Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- Israeli authorities have informed the United States that they were experiencing a severe shortage of ballistic missile interceptors amid the conflict with Iran, Semafor reported citing unnamed US officials.
  • Israel's Iron Dome Works Worse Every Day — Iran's Diplomat Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- "Their capabilities are decreasing day by day. Initially, the interception rate was higher, but now it has become much lower, as their ability to counter diminishes over time," Iranian Ambassador to Moscow Kazem Jalali told Sputnik.

  • 'Terms Aren't Good Enough': Trump Rejects Iran Deal for Now Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- Donald Trump claimed in an NBC telephone interview that Iran is willing to negotiate to end the war the US and Israel unleashed against it.

  • Iran does not hesitate to confront aggressors: Pezeshkian to Macron Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has affirmed the Islamic Republic's unwavering resolve to defend its territorial integrity and national security, telling French President Emmanuel Macron that Iran "does not hesitate" to confront aggressors.
  • Iran has not requested a ceasefire, will fight as long as necessary: Araghchi Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the Islamic Republic has not requested a ceasefire, nor has it sought negotiations for a cessation of hostilities amid the ongoing US-Israeli aggression against the country.
  • Iran strongly condemns US-Israeli attacks on its civilian aviation Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iran has strongly condemned US-Israeli attacks targeting the country's civil aviation infrastructure.
  • Iran Intelligence Ministry arrests 18 mercenaries of terrorist 'Iran International' TV channel Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Intelligence Ministry says it has identified and arrested 18 mercenaries of the terrorist "Iran International" television channel.
  • Trump's repeated claims of defeating Iran 'hilarious': Parliament Speaker Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf has ridiculed US President Donald Trump's repeated claims of defeating Iran in the joint aggression with Israel against the country.
  • Enemies have no option but to surrender to Iran: Top commander Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- A top Iranian commander says the armed forces have dealt heavy blows to the enemies since United States and Israel launched their war of aggression late last month, adding that they have no option but to surrender.
  • Israel may have hit civilian areas in Arab states to sabotage their ties with Iran: Araghchi Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says Iran has never targeted residential areas in neighboring Arab countries, something that Israel may have done in a bid to destroy Tehran's relations with Arab countries.
  • Iran to Germany's Merz: Demand American and Israeli aggressors stop war, not Iran Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- The spokesman for the Iranian Foreign Ministry has censured German Chancellor Friedrich Merz over his "beyond absurd" appeal from the Islamic Republic to stop its operations in retaliation against the US-Israeli war of aggression.
  • Iran Ready to Defend Itself, Not Asking for Ceasefire, Negotiations - Foreign Minister Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- Iran is ready to defend itself for as long as necessary and has not requested either a ceasefire or negotiations, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Sunday.
  • Iran to Welcome Any Regional Initiative to End Conflict - Foreign Minister Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- Iran will welcome any regional initiative leading to a just end to the conflict in the Middle East for Tehran, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Sunday.

  • Middle East crisis: UN health agency releases emergency funds for Lebanon, Iraq, Syria UN News 15 Mar 2026 -- The UN World Health Organization (WHO) is releasing another $2 million in emergency funds to support health systems in Lebanon, Iraq and Syria as strikes against Iran by the US and Israeli continue amid counterstrikes across the Gulf and wider region by Tehran.
  • 'No miscalculation': WHO chief says US Israel committing war crimes by attacking hospitals, schools Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- World Health Organization (WHO) director general has denounced the US-Israeli bombings of hospitals and schools as "war crimes" that cannot be justified as "miscalculations."

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 15 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 15 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Seven Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Riyadh and Eastern Regions SPA 15 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Three Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 15 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 15 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 15 Mar 2026

  • PM call with President Trump of the United States: 15 March 2026 Gov.UK 15 Mar 2026
  • Prime Minister Carney speaks with Prime Minister of the United Kingdom Sir Keir Starmer Prime Minister of Canada 15 Mar 2026
  • PM call with Prime Minister Carney of Canada: 15 March 2026 Gov.UK 15 Mar 2026
  • GCC-UK Ministers' Meeting On Iran's Attacks against GCC States Gulf Cooperation Council 15 Mar 2026
  • Iran, Ukraine involved in bitter dispute as Kiev reportedly offers anti-drone expertise to US, Gulf allies Global Times 15 Mar 2026 -- While the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran has continued to draw global attention, a bitter dispute has erupted between Iran and Ukraine over Kiev's offer to share anti-drone expertise in the Middle East.

  • Hamas congratulates Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei on election as Leader of Islamic Revolution Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Mohammad Darwish, head of the leadership council of the Hamas resistance movement, has extended his warmest congratulations to Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei on his election as the new Leader of the Islamic Revolution of Iran, praising the smooth transition of leadership despite the complex security situation following the martyrdom of his father.

  • Interview: Iran's Use Of Chinese Doctrine And Tech Under The Spotlight RFE/RL 15 Mar 2026 -- The Iran war offers huge lessons for the effectiveness of Chinese military doctrine and hardware, both used by the Iranian military, according to Eran Ortal, a reserve Brigadier General in the Israel Defense Forces (IDF).

Defense Policy / Programs

  • US Navy Delays Retirement of USS Nimitz Amid Carrier Fleet Crunch Sputnik 15 Mar 2026 -- As the US continues its aggression against Iran, its own Navy scrambles to maintain its legally mandated 11 operational aircraft carriers, according to ISNI News.
  • Coast Guard Cutter William Hart returns home following 48-day Operation Blue Pacific Patrol in Oceania US Coast Guard 15 Mar 2026 -- The crew of Coast Guard Cutter William Hart (WPC 1134) returned to Honolulu Sunday following a 48-day patrol in support of Coast Guard Oceania District's Operation Blue Pacific in Oceania.

  • Address by Minister of Defence of Russian Federation Andrei Belousov to veterans, command, and personnel of Main Directorate for International Military Cooperation of Russian Ministry of Defence Russia MoD 15 Mar 2026

  • Taiwan military official denies delay in delivery of MQ-9Bs CNA 15 Mar 2026 -- A Taiwan defense official said Sunday that the delivery of the first two of four SkyGuardian drones Taipei purchased from the United States is set to take place in the second half of this year in accordance with the original schedule.

  • KPA Long-range Artillery Sub-unit in Western Area Conducts Firepower Strike Drill KCNA 15 Mar 2026 -- A long-range artillery sub-unit of the Korean People's Army in the western area conducted a firepower strike drill on March 14.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • IDF Spokesperson and Police Spokesperson joint statement Israel MFA 15 Mar 2026

  • Hezbollah hits Israeli military air base near Tel Aviv Press TV 15 Mar 2026 -- Hezbollah has launched a number of new resistance operations, striking Israeli bases, military equipment and gatherings of soldiers deep inside the occupied territories.

  • General Secretariats of League of Arab States, Organisation of Islamic Cooperation, and Commission of African Union condemn continued closure of Al-Aqsa Mosque by Israeli occupation authorities League of Arab States 15 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the League of Arab States, the General Secretariat of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation, and the Commission of the African Union affirm the central status of the Holy City of Jerusalem and the established religious rights and enduring bond of Muslims with Al-Aqsa Mosque, the first qibla and the third of the Two Holy Sanctuaries.
  • Spain condemns violence in West Bank Spain MFA 15 Mar 2026 -- The Spanish Government condemns the unacceptable escalation of violence in the West Bank that began on 28 February, and expresses its deep dismay and condemnation of the deaths of Palestinian citizens in the West Bank, as well as the persecution and systemic violence inflicted upon Israeli activists who defend the rights and dignity of Palestinians.
  • Foreign Secretary statement on the situation in Lebanon UK FCDO 15 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Secretary announces over £5m of emergency funding in support of the humanitarian work of the Lebanese Government.

    • Other Conflicts

  • WFP delivers lifesaving assistance to families caught in conflict in Afghanistan WFP 15 Mar 2026 -- The United Nations World Food Programme (WFP) has begun to rapidly mobilize a large-scale emergency response for communities in Afghanistan impacted by the conflict with Pakistan and is adapting quickly to keep life-saving aid moving despite violence in the region and shipping disruptions.

  • Army: No security threat to 1st BARMM polls Philippine News Agency 15 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Army (PA) has not monitored threats that could mar the first parliamentary elections in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), set on Sept. 14.

News Reports

  • Wang Yi Meets with Vietnamese Foreign Minister Le Hoai Trung PRC MofA 15 Mar 2026

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 15 Mar 2026

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Plants Trees in Saeppyol Street on Tree-planting Day KCNA 15 Mar 2026 -- Kim Jong Un , general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, planted trees at the pondside park in Saeppyol Street on March 14, the tree-planting day.

  • Telephone conversation between Jean-Noël Barrot, Minister for Europe and Foreign Affairs, and his Algerian counterpart, Ahmed Attaf (15 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 15 Mar 2026

  • Prime Minister Carney deepens cooperation with Nordic countries in defence, Arctic security, and critical minerals Prime Minister of Canada 15 Mar 2026 -- In a more dangerous, divided, and uncertain world, security can no longer be taken for granted. Canada is strengthening its defences in the North and working closely with trusted partners to protect our sovereignty and reinforce collective security.
  • Joint statement by the Prime Ministers of the Nordic countries and Canada Prime Minister of Canada 15 Mar 2026

  • Journalists Detained As Kazakhstan Holds Controversial Referendum RFE/RL 15 Mar 2026 -- Kazakhstan held a controversial constitutional referendum on March 15 proposing sweeping political changes that critics say could further concentrate power in the presidency.
